meta.purpose: E2E equivalence test scenarios for Odoo construction modules → Privod2 Next platform
notes: Endpoints with {param} notation require runtime substitution from previous step responses
Some scenarios have repeat steps that should be executed N times with incrementing data
All POST/PUT/PATCH requests require valid JWT Bearer token in Authorization header
Expected responses describe structural expectations, not exact field values
The backend requires role seeding (VIEWER, ADMIN, etc.) before registration works

scenarios.name: Project Lifecycle: Create → Status → Team Assignment
scenarios.description: Create a construction project, update its status through the lifecycle (draft → active → on_hold → completed), and assign team members. Validates that the Odoo construction.project model lifecycle maps to /api/projects endpoints with status transitions.

payload.name: E2E Test Project Alpha
payload.description: End-to-end test project for parity validation

steps.action: Assign a team member (project manager) to the project
Verify project appears in project listing

scenarios.name: Contract Lifecycle: Create → Submit → Approve → Activate → Close
scenarios.description: Full contract lifecycle matching Odoo construction.contract workflow states (draft → submitted → approved → signed → active → closed). Tests /api/contracts endpoints and approval workflow.

scenarios.name: Procurement: Material Request → Approve → Purchase Order
scenarios.description: Create a purchase/material request, go through approval, link to a purchase order. Maps Odoo LRV (lrv) and auto_approval_rule capabilities to /api/purchase-requests endpoints.

steps.action: Create a purchase request for materials
Create purchase order from approved request

scenarios.name: Supply Chain: Purchase Order → Delivery → Receiving → Warehouse
scenarios.description: Track material from purchase order through delivery, receiving at site, and warehouse entry. Maps Odoo dispatch_order, stock movements, and UPD to /api/deliveries, /api/warehouse/movements, /api/procurement-ext endpoints.

steps.action: Create a delivery for a purchase order

scenarios.name: Work Execution: Create Work Order → Assign Crew → Report Progress → Complete
scenarios.description: Full work execution flow mapping Odoo work_order/crew/daily_log capabilities. Create a work order, assign a crew, record daily progress entries, and mark as complete.

payload.title: Foundation Concrete Pouring - Block A
payload.description: Pour concrete for foundation of Block A, levels -3 to -1

steps.action: Add work entry to daily log

payload.description: Poured 50m3 of concrete for foundation level -3

scenarios.name: Quality Control: Create Inspection → Record Results → Pass/Fail
scenarios.description: Quality inspection workflow mapping Odoo punch_item, material_certificate, audit_checklist to /api/quality and /api/punchlist endpoints.

payload.title: Hairline crack in foundation wall section 3B

steps.action: Update punch item status to resolved
Verify punch item closed after inspection

scenarios.name: Safety/HSE: Report Violation → Investigate → Remediate → Close
scenarios.description: HSE violation lifecycle mapping Odoo safety_training model and HSE workflows to /api/safety endpoints.

payload.title: Worker without safety harness at height
payload.description: Worker observed at 12m height without proper fall protection equipment

scenarios.name: Budget: Create Budget → Allocate Lines → Track Spending
scenarios.description: Budget lifecycle mapping Odoo budget_item and EVM capabilities to /api/budgets, /api/budget-lines, /api/cost-codes endpoints.

scenarios.name: Payment: Create Payment Request → Approve → Execute
scenarios.description: Payment lifecycle mapping Odoo acquiring_payment and invoice workflows to /api/payments, /api/invoices endpoints.

scenarios.name: Documents: Generate KS-2 Act → Add Lines → Submit → Sign → Close
scenarios.description: Russian construction document KS-2 (Act of completed works) lifecycle. Maps Odoo ks2/ks3 models to /api/ks2 and /api/ks3 endpoints, including PDF generation.

scenarios.name: Change Management: Create Change Request → Review → Approve → Update Budget
scenarios.description: Change order management mapping Odoo change_request capability. Create change event, submit change order request, approve, and verify budget impact.

payload.title: Soil condition change - additional piling required
payload.description: Geotechnical survey reveals softer soil than expected at Block B

payload.title: Additional piling works - Block B
payload.justification: Required for structural safety per updated geotechnical report

steps.action: Submit change order request for review

payload.description: Additional bored piling - 24 piles at Block B

scenarios.name: Schedule: Create Milestones → Set Baseline → Track Progress → Update
scenarios.description: Schedule management mapping Odoo monthly_schedule, critical_path, gantt_dependency capabilities to /api/milestones, /api/schedule-baselines, /api/wbs-nodes endpoints.

scenarios.name: Warehouse: Receive Materials → Store → Issue → Track Inventory
scenarios.description: Full warehouse cycle mapping Odoo m29, stock_limit, dispatch_order capabilities to /api/warehouse endpoints.

scenarios.name: HR: Assign Employee to Project → Track Time → Evaluate KPI
scenarios.description: HR lifecycle mapping Odoo brigade, staffing_plan, time_entry, time_sheet, kpi capabilities to /api/employees, /api/timesheets, /api/kpis endpoints.

scenarios.name: Reports: Generate Project Summary → Configure → Export PDF
scenarios.description: Report generation mapping Odoo executive_doc, report_config, auto_document_generation capabilities to /api/analytics/reports and /api/pdf-reports endpoints.

scenarios.name: Multi-Role: Test Same Operations as Admin, Manager, Viewer
scenarios.description: Validate role-based access control by performing identical operations with different user roles. Maps to Odoo ACL/record_rules system.

steps.action: Viewer tries to create a project (should fail with 403)
Viewer tries to delete project (should fail with 403)

scenarios.name: Bulk Operations: Create Multiple Items → Bulk Status Change
scenarios.description: Test bulk/batch operations for tasks, punch items, and notification settings. Validates batch processing parity with Odoo's server actions.

steps.action: Bulk update task statuses via individual PATCH calls

scenarios.name: Search/Filter: Search by Various Criteria Across Modules
scenarios.description: Test search and filtering capabilities across multiple modules. Validates that Next provides equivalent search to Odoo's domain filtering.

steps.action: Filter tasks by assignee and status

scenarios.name: Audit Trail: Verify Changes Are Logged via Chatter/Changelog
scenarios.description: Validate that all state changes produce audit trail entries. Maps to Odoo's chatter system (mail.message, mail.activity) and Next's /api/chatter endpoints.

steps.action: Verify changelog has UPDATE entry with field diffs

payload.body: This is an audit trail test comment

scenarios.name: Integration: 1C Sync → Verify Data Consistency
scenarios.description: Test 1C integration endpoints for data synchronization. Maps to Odoo external_endpoints and sync_config capabilities.

scenarios.name: Estimate: Create Estimate → Add Lines → Version → Price Coefficients
scenarios.description: Construction estimate lifecycle mapping Odoo estimate, estimate_norm, specification, price_coefficient capabilities to /api/estimates, /api/specifications endpoints.

scenarios.name: Document Management: Upload → Review → Transmit → Archive
scenarios.description: Common Data Environment (CDE) document lifecycle mapping Odoo drawing, executive_doc, permit_doc capabilities to /api/cde and /api/documents endpoints.

scenarios.name: Dashboard: Create Custom Dashboard → Add Widgets → View Analytics
scenarios.description: Dashboard and analytics mapping Odoo home_dashboard capability to /api/dashboards, /api/analytics endpoints.

scenarios.name: Inventory Check: Create → Count → Reconcile → Complete
scenarios.description: Physical inventory check workflow mapping Odoo warehouse inspection processes to /api/warehouse/inventory-checks endpoints.

scenarios.name: Construction Journals: Hidden Work Act → KS-6 Journal → KS-11 Acceptance
scenarios.description: Russian regulatory construction documentation flow. Hidden work acts (AOSR) must be recorded before work is covered. KS-6 general journal tracks all work. KS-11 for final acceptance. Maps Odoo hidden_work_act, ks6, ks6a, ks11 capabilities.

payload.title: Foundation Waterproofing - Block A
payload.workDescription: Application of bitumen waterproofing membrane on foundation walls

steps.action: Get daily log timeline for project
